caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to audio recording, as evidenced by the professional microphone setup. The background includes framed photographs on the wall, suggesting a personal or creative space, and there are clothing racks and a mannequin visible, indicating that this might also be part of a retail environment or a multifunctional space. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to the content of his shirt or sharing personal stories. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
